title: micrampelis macrocarpa
intro: Micrampelis macrocarpa, also known as creeping snowberry or mountain creeping snowberry, is a low-growing, woody perennial plant native to the mountainous regions of the western United States. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its astringent and anti-inflammatory compounds, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Micrampelis macrocarpa include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in teas, tinctures, and salves, and are often used to treat skin irritations and minor wounds.
